message:
fix(http,database): h3_native QPACK static table + header validation + mysql IPv6/timeout

h3_native.rs (4 bugs fixed):
- M1: Complete QPACK static table (RFC 9204 entries 0-98) — previously
  missing entries 2-14, 29-62, 72-98 caused interop failures with
  conformant HTTP/3 peers sending indexed references to common headers
- M2: Guard against prefix_len >= 8 overflow in qpack_decode_string
- M3: Add header name/value content validation — reject uppercase names,
  null bytes, CR/LF in values per RFC 9114 §4.2
- L6: Accept unknown unidirectional stream types per RFC 9114 §6.2
  instead of rejecting them (H3UniStreamType::Unknown variant)

mysql.rs (3 bugs fixed):
- M4: Apply connect_timeout to TcpStream::connect_timeout when set
- M8: Handle IPv6 bracket notation in URL parsing ([::1]:3306)
- M2: Preserve first occurrence of duplicate column names (entry().or_insert)

18 new tests added.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
